Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.proofSimplifierTests

Class AbstractSimplificationTests

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.proofSimplifierTests.AbstractSimplificationTests
Direct Known Subclasses:
HypActionSimplificationTests, NodeRemovalTests, NoSimplificationTests, ReorganizationTests
public abstract class AbstractSimplificationTests extends Object
Abstract class for tree shape based proof simplification tests.
